title: Share foreign Iceberg tables with Delta Sharing (Public Preview)
body: You can now share foreign Iceberg tables federated from foreign Iceberg catalogs using Delta Sharing. Providers can add foreign Iceberg tables to a share, and recipients access the shared data in read-only format. See [Add foreign Iceberg tables to a share](/aws/en/opensharing/create-share#foreign-iceberg).

ref_links.text: Add foreign Iceberg tables to a share
